ValidationRule.description: Validate if the requirement is met when the IEN field is populated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'In Progress') || ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed'), Allow_Pre_Enrollment__c = FALSE, NOT(ISBLANK(Individual_Enrollment__c)), Requirement_Met__c = FALSE, Individual_Enrollment__r.Bypass_Requirement_Met__c = FALSE )
